AuthorizeServerEvent.action: Action to perform on the instance; value for this API: AuthorizeServerEvent
AuthorizeServerEvent.serverEventId: Maintenance event ID; one of serverEventId or instanceId is required
AuthorizeServerEvent.instanceId: Instance ID; one of serverEventId or instanceId is required
AuthorizeServerEvent.authorizeMaintenanceOperation: Authorized maintenance operation; refer to the operation returned in the event
AuthorizeServerEvent.executeTime: Authorized execution time; date format compliant with BCE specification
